hero.headline: Your AI. Your rules.
hero.subline: We build and deploy private LLM and AI solutions for your infrastructure — private models, private data, no compromises.

about.heading: About Us
about.description: vxltxr llc is an independent AI research and engineering lab. We believe every organization — from growing startups to established enterprises — deserves access to private, sovereign AI. Our commercial practice makes that real: with consulting that transfers knowledge, not dependency.

items.title: Private LLM Deployment
items.description: Run large language models on your own hardware or private cloud. Your data stays yours — always.

items.title: Agentic Systems
items.description: Agentic or Context Management layer: autonomous, tool-using, multi-step thinkers tailored to your workflows.

items.title: Infrastructure Design
items.description: From a single cloud GPU to a private cluster — we design and help to set up the infrastructure your AI needs to run.

items.title: Strategy & Consulting
items.description: Not sure where to start? We help you pick the right models, the right architecture, and the right approach for your budget.

steps.title: Free Intro Call
steps.description: A 30 minute conversation to learn about each other and understand your needs.

steps.title: Case Study Meeting
steps.description: A 90 minute deep-dive where we present a tailored proposal for your project.
